case_title: SANDRA VILLANEUVA ET AL VS. CLAUDIA ABREGO BARILLAS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-23-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-14-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF SANDRA VILLANEUVA. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF CLAUDIA SANABRIA. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT CLAUDIA ABREGO BARILLAS. AS PER THE AGREEMENT AT THE LAST HEARING THE CASE WILL CONTINUED FOR 6 MONTHS. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NOV-14-2019 THEN SUBSEQUENT PROGRESS REPORTS TO BE SET EVERY 6 MONTHS UNTIL THE COMPLETION DATE OF NOV-08-2020. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR JUN-04-2020 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: PLAINTIFF: SANDRA VILLANEUVA;(ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,550.00 FILED BY VILLANEUVA, SANDRA SANABRIA, CLAUDIA AS TO DEFENDANT BARILLAS, CLAUDIA ABREGO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-11-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. APPEARANCE THE MAY-11-2020 IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR AGREEMENT IS NOT MET. PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE HEARING THE MATTER IS TO BE CONTINUED FOR 6 MONTH REVOLVING DATES UNTIL THE COMPLETION DATE OF NOV 2020, AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 05/21/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR MAY-11-2020 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: PLAINTIFF: SANDRA VILLANEUVA;(ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
ORDER CASE DIMISSIED WITH PREJUDICE AS PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
REMARK: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE MAILED TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED: INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-23-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT SANDRA VILLANEUVA. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT CLAUDIA SANABRIA. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT CLAUDIA BARILLAS. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. DEFENDANT WAIVED PROOF OF SERVICE. PRIOR TO HEARING PARTIES CAME TO A SETTTLEMENT AGREEMENT ASSISTED BY THE MEDIATORS. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE MAY-23-2019 THEN SUBSEQUENT PROGRESS REPORTS TO BE SET EVERY 6 MONTHS UNTIL THE COMPLETION DATE OF NOV-08-2020. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NOV-2020 HEARING MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-20-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES IS REQUIRED. APPEARANCE AT THE AUG-20-2020 HEARING IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR AGREEMENT IS NOT MET. PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE HEARING THE MATTER IS TO BE CONTINUED FOR 6 MONTH REVOLVING DATES UNTIL THE COMPLETION DATE OF NOV 2020, AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED: RETURN TO SENDER/VACANT
REMARK: RETURN MAIL-ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO SANDRA VILLANUEVA-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-04-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-15-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 W. TRUPEK (506)
